WITH stadium_concert_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        s.name, 
        s.capacity, 
        COUNT(c.concert_id) AS concert_count,
        RANK() OVER(ORDER BY COUNT(c.concert_id) DESC) AS concert_rank
    FROM stadiums s
    INNER JOIN concerts c ON s.stadium_id = c.stadium_id
    WHERE c.concert_date > '2013-12-31'
    GROUP BY s.stadium_id, s.name, s.capacity
)
SELECT name, capacity
FROM stadium_concert_counts
WHERE concert_rank = 1;
